evidence: "The most underloved series ever. Edgy and very, very funny."
"Compelling viewing. From the base camp to the death zone, you won't want to miss a minute."
"Great, pulls-no-punches television. Not for the feint of heart. It's edgy, and will challenge your thinking. And it's laugh aloud funny!"
"I have no idea why this very funny, edgy comedy never caught on."
No specific creators or franchises mentioned.

summary: The user enjoys light-hearted comedies and dramas with fast pacing and a focus on emotional resonance. They appreciate stories that are engaging and fun, often highlighting humor and heart, but show little loyalty to specific creators or franchises.
